basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 16 May 2026 on the official website of Mahatma Gandhi University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MGU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Geography/Geology/Environmental Studies/Environmental Science or allied disciplines with minimum 55% marks or its equivalent grade. B.Ed. degree with 55% marks or its equivalent grade. NET/Ph.D.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MGU Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Assistant Professor on Contract (Geography) post at Mahatma Gandhi University is scheduled for 23rd May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in Geography/Geology/Environmental Studies/Environmental Science or allied disciplines with at least 55% marks, a B.Ed. degree with 55% marks, and either NET or Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 40,000 per month for the Assistant Professor on Contract (Geography) post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this MGU recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor on Contract (Geography) post at Mahatma Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this MGU job?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates are assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) office. Specific timings and exact venue details should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit specified for this position?
faq.answer: The age limit for this position is as per the UGC Regulations. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details regarding age criteria and any applicable relaxations.
